title: Anthropic rents SpaceX?
summary: Anthropic partnered with SpaceX to access Colossus, a major GPU cluster. The commentator argues this reveals Anthropic lacks vertical integration compared to other frontier labs, relying on external partners for chips and infrastructure. The video contends the AI race is shifting toward control of chips, energy, and datacenters rather than model benchmarks alone.
